cookie.message: SmartSwing AI uses essential storage for sign-in and product flow, and may use analytics or consent-based technologies to improve performance and marketing in regions where allowed.

hook.heading: Great coaching shouldn’t cost $150/hour.
hook.body: Most players never get the precise, personalised feedback they need to actually improve. Professional coaching is expensive, generic advice is useless, and guessing doesn’t work. SmartSwing AI changes all of that.
hook.body2: One video. Instant expert-level analysis. A clear action plan. No waitlists, no travel, no wasted sessions.

hiw.title: Three steps to a better game.
hiw.sub: No special equipment, no lengthy setup. Just your phone and one swing clip.

step1.title: Record Your Swing
step1.desc: Film a short video of your forehand, backhand, or serve from any angle using your phone.

step2.title: AI Analyses Instantly
step2.desc: Our biomechanics engine evaluates posture, rotation, contact point, follow-through, and 12 more metrics.

step3.title: Get Your Action Plan
step3.desc: Receive a personalised drill programme, tactical guidance, and progress tracking — ready to share with your coach.

howItWorks.heading: Upload once. Train smarter forever.
howItWorks.tagline: Most players finish a session without knowing what went wrong. SmartSwing closes that gap in 60 seconds — so every rep after this one is smarter than the last.

step1.title: Film one stroke — any device
step1.body: Phone, tablet, or fence mount. SmartSwing checks your camera angle before analysis starts, so the report is based on clean signal — not guesswork.

step2.title: AI reads your biomechanics
step2.body: 33 body landmarks tracked. Your stroke compared to level-adjusted benchmarks — not pro-only standards that don't apply to your game. Your top 3 issues, ranked by impact.

step3.title: Train with a plan built for you
step3.body: Specific drills for your specific issues. Tactical adjustments that make the mechanical fix stick in real match points. Not generic. Not a content dump. Just what you need next.

features.heading: Your AI coach — available 24/7, costs less than one lesson.
features.tagline: One platform for everything a serious player needs: AI analysis, personalized drills, match tactics, progress tracking, and coach workflows — all in one place.
features.title: Everything you need to improve — nothing you don't.

bio.title: Deep Biomechanics Analysis
bio.desc: 15+ data points including stance width, hip rotation, shoulder alignment, racket path, and contact zone.

drills.title: Personalised Drill Plans
drills.desc: Specific, sequenced drills targeted to your weaknesses — not generic YouTube advice.

tactical.title: Tactical Breakdown
tactical.desc: Shot selection, court positioning, and match strategy insights to elevate your mental game.

engine.title: The film room every serious player deserves.
engine.copy: Every report tells you what improved, what slipped, and exactly what to fix next — session over session, so your progress is never invisible again.

m1.label: clear report instead of disconnected numbers

m2.label: priority drills and tactics, not a content dump

m3.label: session memory across reports and dashboards

analysis.title: Angles translated into coaching language
analysis.summary: The report turns raw movement data into a short explanation players can act on immediately.
analysis.whatDetail: the biggest angle changes are explained in plain English, not biomechanics jargon.
analysis.whyDetail: players follow through faster when they understand the cost of the movement mistake.

tracking.title: Digestible dashboards
tracking.summary: Player and coach tabs separate analytics, messages, schedule, and training into cleaner views.
tracking.whatDetail: progress graphs and next actions live in separate lanes instead of one crowded dashboard.
tracking.whyDetail: the player sees one weekly focus and the coach gets faster triage.

coach.title: Assign drills and follow through
coach.summary: Coach notes, assignments, and schedule context stay attached to the same athlete record.
coach.whatDetail: the coach can move from report to message to assignment without rewriting everything.
coach.whyDetail: one precise note can become the athlete's next drill block and session focus.

dualSport.title: Tennis first, pickleball ready
dualSport.summary: The platform can expand without making the tennis experience feel generic or watered down.
dualSport.whatDetail: SmartSwing keeps tennis as the lead experience while allowing the workflow to branch cleanly.
dualSport.whyDetail: new sports can inherit the system without diluting the core product.

features.accessBody: Scoped visibility, entitlement checks, role-based messaging, trial enforcement, and plan limits protect the right data and the right flows.
features.accessDetail1: Predictable: privacy, subscription limits, and coach access enforce themselves.
features.bioDesc: Our AI tracks 15+ biomechanics data points frame by frame — shoulder rotation, hip alignment, elbow angle, contact point height, stance width, racket path, and more. Every measurement is compared against level-adjusted benchmarks so the feedback fits you , not a pro player.
features.bioItem1: Shoulder, elbow, hip, knee, trunk, wrist — all tracked simultaneously
features.bioItem2: Level-adjusted scoring: beginner benchmarks vs tournament benchmarks are different
features.bioItem3: Age and gender context applied before scoring — fair for juniors and masters alike
features.bioItem4: Results explained in plain English — "your elbow is too low at contact" not raw angles
features.coachExp1: Faster triage — who needs help, what changed, and what to assign next, in one view.
features.coachExp2: Better athlete accountability — one system for messaging, assignments, and schedule flow.
features.coachExp3: Clearer reporting — coach-ready summaries that say what matters without raw scoring clutter.
features.coachExp4: Scalable workflows — manage a full roster without custom software or spreadsheets.
features.dashboardsBody: Messaging, scheduling, drills, analytics, and activities separated so each role sees exactly what it needs.
features.dashboardsDetail1: Role-scoped: player and coach views never compete for the same screen real estate.
features.dashboardsDetail2: One source: exports, scheduling, and library access all obey the active plan automatically.
features.drill1Desc: Stand sideways, practice the full swing motion focusing on hip-to-shoulder sequence. 3 sets of 10 slow reps.
features.drill2Desc: Stand near a wall and practice meeting the ball at the right contact height. Builds muscle memory for waist-level strikes.
features.drill3Desc: 10-ball rally blocks focusing on the corrected technique. Unlock when drill 1 scores improve.
features.drillBody1: Most apps dump 10 drills at once. We give you one. The drill that targets your single biggest weakness, with clear steps, a rep count, and a simple coaching cue — nothing more.
features.drillBody2: As your scores improve, the next drill unlocks. Progress is built in, not left to chance.
features.drillCheck1: Matched to your exact weakest metric from the analysis
features.drillCheck3: Includes a SMART weekly goal tied to the drill
features.drillCheck4: Coaching tip included — not just what to do, but how to feel it
features.faq1A: SmartSwing AI analyzes biomechanics including stroke mechanics, hip rotation, contact point, footwork patterns, and follow-through. It identifies your top technical issues and maps them to drills and tactical adjustments — in plain language you can act on immediately.
features.faq1Q: What does SmartSwing AI analyze in a tennis video?
features.faq2A: Yes. Coaches get a dedicated dashboard to review player reports, assign drills, add notes, and track progress over time. The coach workflow is fully separate from the player view so each role only sees what it needs.
features.faq2Q: Does SmartSwing AI work for coaches?
features.faq3A: No. SmartSwing AI is fully web-based. Upload a video from any browser on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop — with no app download required.
features.faq3Q: Do I need to download an app to use SmartSwing AI?
features.faq4A: Most reports are ready within 60 seconds of uploading a video. You get your top 3 priority fixes, matching drill recommendations, and tactical guidance without waiting.
features.faq4Q: How fast does SmartSwing AI generate a report?
features.faq5A: The scoring engine adjusts for level, age, and gender so a beginner's report is benchmarked differently from an advanced player's. This prevents discouraging output and makes progress feel meaningful at every stage.
features.faq5Q: How is the scoring adjusted for different player levels?
features.playerExp1: "I know what to fix first." — Top 3 feedback replaces a confusing metric wall.
features.playerExp2: "I can actually follow the plan." — Drills, tactics, and dashboard actions stay connected.
features.playerExp3: "The score feels fair." — Level, age, and gender adjustments prevent demotivating outputs.
features.playerExp4: "Progress feels real." — Session-over-session tracking makes improvement visible.
features.reportsBody: Angles are translated into coaching insight, expandable explanations, and clear fixes — not walls of disconnected logic.
features.reportsDetail1: Plain English: movement data becomes actionable feedback players, parents, and coaches can use immediately.
features.reportsDetail2: Priority feed: the same top issues flow into drills, tactics, and coach notes automatically.
features.tactic1Body: Your forehand scores 83% — it's a weapon. When you get a short ball, redirect cross-court with topspin to push opponent wide.
features.tactic1Title: Use your stronger forehand cross-court on second ball
features.tactic2Body: Your backhand scores 62% under pressure. Redirect cross-court on defensive backhand returns until the technique score reaches 75%+.
features.tactic2Title: Avoid running backhand down-the-line under pressure
features.tactic3Body: After an error, take 2 deep breaths, bounce the ball 3 times, and use one word: "smooth". Builds consistency under pressure.
features.tacticCheck1: Shot selection recommendations matched to your current level
features.tacticCheck2: Court positioning principles for each shot type
features.tacticCheck3: Pattern recognition: when to go cross-court vs down the line
features.tacticCheck4: Mental game cues: pressure handling, reset patterns, confidence triggers
features.tacticDesc: Technique fixes win practice sessions. Tactics win matches. SmartSwing AI links your biomechanics data to shot selection, court positioning, and pattern recognition — so your better technique actually shows up when it counts.
features.testimonial1: "The report finally told me what mattered. Not ten disconnected numbers. Just the three things costing me depth and consistency."
features.testimonial2: "I can see what changed, why it matters, and what to assign next without rewriting the whole session plan."
features.testimonial3: "My son stopped asking if the score was bad and started asking what the next drill would improve. That's a huge shift."
features.testimonial4: "It feels like a film room and a coach note in one screen. The numbers finally connect to a decision I can make on court."
features.trainingBody: Recommendation logic limits output to the top 3 drill plans and top 3 tactical plays — no overwhelm, just the next best action.
features.trainingDetail1: Focused: fewer choices means better compliance and stronger habit formation.

t2.quote: "It caught a footwork habit I’d had for 12 years. My coach read the report and couldn’t believe how precise it was. Now we train with a shared goal every session — this is what data-driven coaching looks like."

t3.quote: "I use SmartSwing with every new student as the first session baseline. The AI gives me a 60-second report I can build a 3-month plan from. My coaching sessions are 30% more focused now."

t5.quote: "As a 55-year-old returning to tennis after 10 years, I was nervous about tech like this. But the report was in plain English, the drill was simple, and my backhand timing improved in two sessions. Remarkable."

pricingPage.urgency1Title: Early access pricing — lock in your rate before it changes
pricingPage.urgency1Text: Join 2,400+ players already training smarter • Less than $1/day on the Performance plan • Cancel anytime
pricingPage.urgency2Text: SmartSwing Performance: $0.66/day. One month of analysis for less than one hour of coaching.
pricingPage.starterAnchor: Your first insight is already waiting. No card required.
pricingPage.playerAnchor: Less than skipping one lesson. More useful than all of them.
pricingPage.performanceAnchor: This is what consistent improvement feels like.
pricingPage.tournamentAnchor: The edge serious competitors already have.
pricingPage.roiHeading: How much do lessons cost you each month?
pricingPage.roiBody: Move the slider to compare typical coaching spend with SmartSwing Performance. The point is not to replace good coaching. The point is to make every lesson more productive and reduce blind reps between sessions.
pricingPage.roiFramingText: Use SmartSwing between lessons to keep the feedback loop alive instead of waiting for the next paid hour.
pricingPage.compareHeading: Why players switch from lessons-only to SmartSwing
pricingPage.guaranteeBody: The free tier gives the first useful result. Paid plans then unlock saved reports, richer recommendations, exports, coach messaging, and higher-volume usage. This keeps the funnel honest and the upgrade decision easier.
pricingPage.faq1A: Each generated report counts as one review. Opening the analyzer alone does not consume a credit.
pricingPage.faq2A: Absolutely. Switch up or down whenever you want — no penalties, no friction. Monthly plans cancel anytime. Yearly plans stay active through the end of the paid term.
pricingPage.faq3Q: What if I choose Starter — am I limited?
pricingPage.faq3A: Starter gives you one full analysis per month — enough to prove the concept. When you're ready to train consistently, upgrading takes 30 seconds.
pricingPage.faq4Q: Where do drills and tactics unlock?
pricingPage.faq4A: Pro and Tournament Pro unlock the full drill and tactics library inside reports and the library page.
pricingPage.footerTagline: Web-first tennis intelligence priced to reduce wasted practice and improve lesson carryover.

matchReport.title: Match Report
matchReport.subtitle: Per-rally breakdown from your match video
matchReport.paywallBody: You're seeing the 3 longest rallies as a preview. Upgrade to Performance to drill into every swing — shot-by-shot kinetic-chain scores, per-rally technique grading, and saved match history.
matchReport.emptyBody: Go to Analyze, enable Match mode, pick a player, and let at least 2 rallies play out before generating a report.

howItWorksPage.heading: From one video to your next breakthrough — in 60 seconds.
howItWorksPage.body: Most players finish a practice session without knowing what went wrong. SmartSwing closes that gap in 60 seconds — so every rep after this one is smarter than the last.
howItWorksPage.outcomeH3: Speed to correction is the product.
howItWorksPage.outcomeBody: Every surface should help the player understand what happened, why it matters, and what to do next.
howItWorksPage.step1Heading: Capture the right angle and context
howItWorksPage.step1Body: Film from behind the baseline or fence. SmartSwing guides you on angle quality before analysis even starts — so the report is based on clean signal, not guesswork.
howItWorksPage.step1i1: Pre-capture guidance improves input quality before the upload starts.
howItWorksPage.step1i2: Shot and session intent define the benchmark and feedback frame.
howItWorksPage.step1i3: Profile details keep the scoring fair by level and player context.
howItWorksPage.step2Body: The AI tracks 33 body landmarks, calculates the tennis-specific metrics that matter most, and compares your stroke to level-adjusted benchmarks — not pro-only standards that don't apply to your game.
howItWorksPage.step2i1: Biomechanics, movement, positioning, timing, and contact behavior are assessed together.
howItWorksPage.step2i2: The report emphasizes top priorities instead of overwhelming low-value detail.
howItWorksPage.step2i3: Expandable cards explain what a metric means and how to interpret it.
howItWorksPage.step3Heading: Train with a plan built around YOUR game
howItWorksPage.step3Body: Every report surfaces your top 3 priorities with matching drill videos. Not generic advice — specific prescriptions for your specific movement issues.
howItWorksPage.step3i1: Top 3 drill recommendations tied directly to the main weaknesses.
howItWorksPage.step3i2: Top 3 tactical recommendations based on the player's current profile.
howItWorksPage.step3i3: Coach-ready summary keeps the teaching conversation fast and useful.
howItWorksPage.step4Heading: Track every rep. See yourself improve.
howItWorksPage.step4Body: Your progress dashboard shows exactly how each metric moves over time. Coaches can assign drills, add notes, and track follow-through — all in one place.
howItWorksPage.step4i1: Player and coach views are separated into clean tabs by task.
howItWorksPage.step4i2: Plan limits, trials, and privacy rules are enforced before save, export, and messaging actions.
howItWorksPage.step4i3: Players and coaches stay in their own scoped views so communication and next actions remain easy to follow.
howItWorksPage.ctaHeading: See your game the way a biomechanics coach sees it.
howItWorksPage.footerTagline: Workflow overview from capture to analysis, drills, tactics, and follow-through.

stats.s2: priority fixes, not a metric wall

core.heading: Every layer reinforces the next.
core.sub: The value is not one feature — it is what happens when analysis, drills, coaching, and progress all share a common language.
core.engineTitle: AI video analysis built to drive the next rep, not just the report.
core.engineDesc: Pose tracking, tennis-specific biomechanics, level-adjusted scoring, and top-priority feedback work together so players leave with a real plan.
core.trainingTitle: Drills and tactics tied to weaknesses

tactics.headingHtml:
Not just how you
hit — where and when.

player.heading: What players feel when it works.

proof.heading: Players buy proof. Coaches buy clarity.

cta.heading: Open the analyzer and see the full feature loop live.
cta.body: One video. Sixty seconds. A clear plan for the next session — not a wall of metrics to decode.

hero.heading: The fastest way from 'what went wrong' to 'what to do next.'
hero.body: SmartSwing AI was built because most tennis players finish every session not knowing what actually cost them points — or how to fix it before the next one. We built the AI film room that levels the playing field between coached and uncoached athletes.
hero.solveHeading: What we built it to solve
hero.solve1: The gap between filming a stroke and understanding what's wrong with it — closed to 60 seconds.
hero.solve2: The translation problem between biomechanics data and real coaching language — solved.
hero.solve3: The 'progress feels invisible' problem — fixed with session-over-session tracking.
hero.solve4: The privacy and billing complexity — handled so athletes can focus on tennis.

audience.heading: Built for every player who's serious about getting better
audience.body: SmartSwing AI is for junior athletes building habits, adult players who want clarity between lessons, coaches who need faster triage, and programs that want measurable results across their full roster — without custom software.
audience.disclaimer: The product is meant to support coaching and player development. It is not a substitute for medical advice, emergency response, or a guarantee of athletic results.

how.heading: This is how it works
how.body: Upload one video. Get a biomechanics report with your top 3 priority fixes, matching drills, and tactical guidance. Paid plans add report history, coaching workflows, drill libraries, and progress tracking.

dashboard.title: Player Dashboard
dashboard.startFirst: Start your first analysis to see insights here.

analyzer.title: AI Swing Analyzer
analyzer.subtitle: Record or upload your tennis swing for instant AI-powered biomechanics analysis.
analyzer.signInToSave: Sign in to save history and track monthly usage.
analyzer.dragDrop: Drag and drop your video here or click to browse
analyzer.guidePositionDesc: Place your phone at waist height, in landscape mode, on a stable surface or tripod.
analyzer.guideDistanceDesc: Position 3-4 meters (10-13 feet) from the player, perpendicular to the baseline.
analyzer.guideAngleDesc: Side view capturing the full body from feet to racquet tip. Avoid filming from behind.
analyzer.guideDurationDesc: Record 3-5 swings per session. Each clip should be 5-15 seconds.

library.title: Drills and Tactics Library
library.subtitle: Browse the drill and tactic catalog publicly, then upgrade when you want protected external video links, saved reports, and the full player workflow.
library.noMatchDrills: No drills match your current filters.
library.noMatchTactics: No tactics match your current filters.
library.upgradeRequired: Upgrade required to open external drill video links.

settingsPage.title: Profile Settings
settingsPage.heading: Edit your identity once. Keep every dashboard in sync.
settingsPage.subtitle: Update your name, player details, coach details, profile photo, and contact information in one place.

checkout.title: Confirm your plan
checkout.subtitle: Review your selection and continue to secure payment.
checkout.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

blog.title: SmartSwing AI Blog
blog.subtitle: Expert tennis analysis insights, coaching tips, and product updates.

payment.reviewing: Reviewing the latest handoff from secure billing and verifying it before any paid entitlements unlock.
payment.noChanges: No changes were made to your plan.
payment.cancelledBody: Your current SmartSwing access stays exactly as it was. If you canceled Stripe Checkout, no subscription was created and you can return anytime when you are ready.

hero.heading: We're here. Talk to a real person.
hero.body: Whether you're a player getting started, a coach scaling your roster, or a club exploring a program rollout — we'll respond within one business day.
hero.fastBody: Try one free analysis first, then reach out with your results. We can give you specific feedback in context.

reach.heading: Reach SmartSwing AI
reach.tipsTitle: How to get the most from support

cp.emailDesc: Best for technical questions and account setup.
cp.coachDesc: Best for academy rollout, roster workflows, and dashboard setup.
cp.salesDesc: Best for enterprise, clubs, and strategic integrations.
cp.notice: Your message is sent securely to our support team.
cp.placeholderMessage: Describe your objective, blockers, and expected outcome.
cp.supportTips: 1. Run a free analysis in the Analyzer 2. Save your session to the dashboard 3. Send us your question with your goal and timeline
